assertions.name: identifies_width_margin_math_error
assertions.description: Correctly identifies that width: 33% + margin: 10px causes math issues exceeding 100%

assertions.name: recommends_css_grid_or_gap
assertions.description: Recommends using CSS Grid or the gap property as the solution

assertions.name: explains_unequal_heights
assertions.description: Explains why cards have unequal heights
